Module com.bifasico.soduko
Package com.bifasico.soduko.model

Class Region

java.lang.Object
com.bifasico.soduko.model.Region
public class Region extends Object
Represents a 2×3 region (block) in the Sudoku board. This is an intermediate branch node in the board tree structure. Each region contains exactly 6 Cell leaf nodes.

The 6×6 Sudoku grid is divided into 6 regions arranged as follows: 

   Region 0 | Region 1 | Region 2
   ---------+----------+---------
   Region 3 | Region 4 | Region 5
Each region spans 2 rows and 3 columns in the absolute grid.

    Description
    Region(int index)
    Constructs a Region at the given index and initializes its 6 cells with their absolute grid coordinates.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    containsValue(int value)
    Returns whether a given value (1-6) is already present in this region's solution values.
    boolean
    containsValueInColumn(int column, int value)
    Returns whether a given value appears in any cell of this region that shares the given column.
    boolean
    containsValueInRow(int row, int value)
    Returns whether a given value appears in any cell of this region that shares the given row.
    Cell

    Returns the cell at the given index within this region (0-5).

    Returns the cell at the given absolute grid coordinates, if it belongs to this region.

    Returns the list of all 6 cells in this region.
    int

    Returns the index of this region within the board (0-5).
    int

    Returns the absolute column index where this region starts in the 6×6 grid.
    int
    getStartRow()
    Returns the absolute row index where this region starts in the 6×6 grid.

  • Field Details

    • CELLS_PER_REGION

      public static final int CELLS_PER_REGION
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • Region

      public Region(int index)
      Constructs a Region at the given index and initializes its 6 cells with their absolute grid coordinates.
      Parameters:
      index - the region index (0-5) in reading order (left-right, top-bottom)

  • Method Details

    • getIndex

      public int getIndex()
      Returns the index of this region within the board (0-5).
      Returns:
      the region index

    • getStartRow

      public int getStartRow()
      Returns the absolute row index where this region starts in the 6×6 grid.
      Returns:
      the start row (0 or 2)

    • getStartColumn

      public int getStartColumn()
      Returns the absolute column index where this region starts in the 6×6 grid.
      Returns:
      the start column (0, 3, or 6)

    • getCells

      public ArrayList<Cell> getCells()
      Returns the list of all 6 cells in this region. The cells are ordered row by row, left to right within the region.
      Returns:
      the cell list

    • getCell

      public Cell getCell(int cellIndex)
      Returns the cell at the given index within this region (0-5). Cells are ordered row-first: indices 0-2 are the top row, 3-5 the bottom row.
      Parameters:
      cellIndex - the index within the region (0-5)
      Returns:
      the corresponding Cell
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if cellIndex is out of range

    • getCellAt

      public Cell getCellAt(int row, int column)
      Returns the cell at the given absolute grid coordinates, if it belongs to this region.
      Parameters:
      row - the absolute row index in the full grid
      column - the absolute column index in the full grid
      Returns:
      the Cell at those coordinates, or null if not in this region

    • containsValue

      public boolean containsValue(int value)
      Returns whether a given value (1-6) is already present in this region's solution values.
      Parameters:
      value - the value to check (1-6)
      Returns:
      true if any cell in this region already has that solution value

    • containsValueInColumn

      public boolean containsValueInColumn(int column, int value)
      Returns whether a given value appears in any cell of this region that shares the given column. Used during board generation to check column constraints across regions.
      Parameters:
      column - the absolute column index to check
      value - the value to look for
      Returns:
      true if a cell in this region at that column already has that value

    • containsValueInRow

      public boolean containsValueInRow(int row, int value)
      Returns whether a given value appears in any cell of this region that shares the given row. Used during board generation to check row constraints across regions.
      Parameters:
      row - the absolute row index to check
      value - the value to look for
      Returns:
      true if a cell in this region at that row already has that value
